privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.s1p1: Zonemation Consulting Group ("Zonemation", "we", "us", or "our") is committed to protecting your privacy and personal data. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, disclose, and safeguard your information when you visit our website zonemation.com or engage with our services.
privacy.s1p2: Zonemation is established under Moroccan law and complies with applicable data protection regulations.
privacy.s2p1: The data controller responsible for your personal data is:
privacy.s3contactInfoDesc: name, email, phone, company name when you submit our contact form.
privacy.s3professionalInfoDesc: job title, company, industry, and project details.
privacy.s3deviceDataDesc: browser type, operating system, device type.
privacy.s3usageDataDesc: pages visited, time spent, referring URLs.
privacy.s4item1: Responding to your inquiries and providing requested services.
privacy.s4item2: Delivering consulting services and managing client relationships.
privacy.s4item3: Sending relevant communications about our services (with your consent).
privacy.s4item4: Improving our website, services, and user experience.
privacy.s4item5: Complying with legal obligations under Moroccan law.
privacy.s5p1: In accordance with Law No. 09-08, we process your data based on:
privacy.s5consentDesc: when you submit forms or opt into communications.
privacy.s5legitimateDesc: to improve our services and maintain security.
privacy.s5legalDesc: to fulfill obligations under Moroccan legislation.
privacy.s6p1: We do not sell your personal data. We may share your information with:
privacy.s6transfersDesc: in connection with a merger or acquisition.
privacy.s7p1: Some service providers may be located outside Morocco. We ensure appropriate safeguards, including contractual clauses guaranteeing adequate data protection.
privacy.s8p1: Contact form submissions are retained for 24 months. Client engagement data is retained for the duration of our business relationship plus 5 years as required by Moroccan commercial law.
privacy.s9p1: Under Law No. 09-08, you have the right to:
privacy.s9accessDesc: request a copy of your personal data.
privacy.s9oppositionDesc: object to processing for legitimate reasons.
privacy.s9contact: To exercise these rights, contact us at
privacy.s10p1: We implement appropriate technical and organizational measures including encrypted communications (TLS/SSL), access controls, regular security assessments, and secure data storage.
privacy.s11p1: Our services are not directed to individuals under 18. We do not knowingly collect data from children.

cookies.title: Cookie Policy
cookies.s1p1: Cookies are small text files placed on your device when you visit a website. They are widely used to make websites work efficiently, provide analytics, and enhance user experience.
cookies.s2essentialLabel: Required for the site to function
cookies.s2essentialDesc: These cookies are necessary for core functionality such as security, session management, and accessibility preferences. You cannot opt out of these cookies.
cookies.s2preferenceDesc: These cookies remember your preferences such as language and theme (dark/light mode), providing a more personalized experience.
cookies.s2analyticsDesc: These cookies help us understand how visitors interact with our website by collecting and reporting information anonymously.
cookies.s4p1: You can control cookies through your browser settings:
cookies.s4item1: View and delete cookies stored on your device.
cookies.s4item5: Delete all cookies when you close your browser.
cookies.s4warning: Blocking essential cookies may affect website functionality.
cookies.s5p1: Our use of cookies complies with Moroccan Law No. 09-08 on the Protection of Individuals with Regard to the Processing of Personal Data.
cookies.s6p1: For questions about our use of cookies, contact us at

terms.title: Terms of Use
terms.s1p1: By accessing and using the Zonemation website, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Use. If you do not agree, please do not use the Site. Zonemation reserves the right to modify these terms at any time. Continued use after changes constitutes acceptance.
terms.s2p1: You agree to use this Site only for lawful purposes and in a manner that does not:
terms.s2item1: Infringe the rights of any third party.
terms.s2item2: Restrict or inhibit any other user from using the Site.
terms.s2item3: Violate any applicable local, national, or international law.
terms.s2item4: Attempt to gain unauthorized access to any part of the Site.
terms.s2item5: Transmit any malicious code, viruses, or harmful data.
terms.s3p1: All content on this Site is the property of Zonemation or its licensors and is protected by Moroccan and international intellectual property laws, including Law No. 2-00 on Copyright and Related Rights.
terms.s3p2: You may not reproduce, distribute, modify, display, publish, or create derivative works from any content without prior written consent.
terms.s4p1: "Zonemation", the Zonemation logo, and all related names, logos, and designs are trademarks of Zonemation Consulting Group. You may not use such marks without prior written permission.
terms.s5p1: Articles, reports, case studies, and other content are provided for general informational purposes only and do not constitute professional advice. Any reliance on such content is at your own risk.
terms.s6p1: This Site may contain links to third-party websites. Zonemation has no control over those sites and does not accept responsibility for any loss arising from your use of them.
terms.s7p1: The Site is provided "as is" and "as available" without warranties of any kind. Zonemation does not warrant that the Site will be uninterrupted, error-free, or free of harmful components.
terms.s8p1: To the fullest extent permitted by Moroccan law, Zonemation shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, or consequential damages resulting from your use of the Site.
terms.s9p1: You agree to indemnify and hold harmless Zonemation and its officers, directors, employees, and agents from any claims arising from your use of the Site or violation of these Terms.
terms.s10p1: These Terms are governed by the laws of the Kingdom of Morocco. Any disputes shall be subject to the exclusive jurisdiction of the courts of Casablanca, Morocco.
terms.s11p1: For questions about these Terms, contact us at
